title: Principal Frontend Developer at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Thane-based team.

About Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates:
Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates!
